sections.paragraph:
& מַדַּע (from the root יָדַע [“י compensated by Dagesh as in verbs פן֞”]), a word found in the later [?] Hebrew.

(1) knowledge, 2Ch 1:10, 11 2Ch 1:11, 12 2Ch 1:12 Dan 1:4, 17 .

(2) the mind, the soul, Ecc 10:20, “even in thy mind curse not the king.” LXX. συνείδησις. (Ch. מַנְדַּע, Syr. ܡܰܕܰܥ, ܡܰܕܥܐܳ id.)
